query:
SELECT 
                u."id" as "staff_id", 
                u."full_name", 
                COUNT(b."id") as "count!"
            FROM "book" b
            JOIN "users" u ON b."added_by" = u."id"
            WHERE u."role" = 'staff'
            GROUP BY u."id", u."full_name"
            ORDER BY "count!" DESC, u."full_name" ASC
